entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: A company that should shift focus to validating invisible talent.

entities.name: prestige
entities.context: A concept referring to high-status candidates based on traditional credentials.

entities.name: invisible 70%
entities.context: A concept referring to high-potential talent that is currently overlooked.

entities.name: visible 30%
entities.context: A concept referring to well-known talent marked by traditional credentials.

entities.name: moneyball
entities.context: A reference to identifying undervalued assets in sports.

entities.name: value investing
entities.context: A reference to identifying undervalued assets in financial markets.

relationships.context: Careerspan should focus on validating this group of talent.
Careerspan should stop competing for prestige candidates.
The invisible 70% is contrasted with the visible 30% of talent.
Both concepts involve identifying undervalued assets.
